# DefendableCloud · AI context manifest
# Generated 2026-05-24 · https://defendablecloud.com/

> DefendableCloud is operator-owned private inference with three product
> lanes on one fleet: Inference (per-million-token billing, OpenAI-SDK
> compatible), AgentBench (Tribunal-graded AI agent benchmarking that
> issues Defendable Agent Deeds™), and SwarmCurator (receipted dataset
> curation with Bakery Packs on the shelf or custom concierge intake).
> SwarmFixer is the agent refinery that closes the AgentBench grade→fix
> loop. 128 RTX 6000 Blackwell · 12,288 GB aggregate VRAM · paid in full ·
> data-center-owned · contractual no-logging.

## Operator
Swarm and Bee LLC · DBA Swarm & Bee AI · Florida · D-U-N-S 138652395
A surface of DefendableOS · the third-party defense layer for AI operators.

## Product surfaces
- https://defendablecloud.com/                  — this site
- https://defendableos.com/                     — full DefendableOS product surface
- https://defendableos.com/cloud                — in-context cloud overview
- https://defendableos.com/honeybox             — sister product · edge HoneyBox
- https://defendableos.com/doctrine             — 12-article doctrine
- https://defendableos.com/how-it-works         — depth page · deed + math + drift
- https://docs.defendableos.com/                — documentation
- https://opendefendable.com/                   — OSS standards body (sister)

## The 3-lane rail
- Lane 01 · Inference         · per-million-token billing · OpenAI-SDK compat
- Lane 02 · AgentBench        · Tribunal grading · Defendable Agent Deed™ issued
- Lane 03 · SwarmCurator      · Bakery Packs + Custom Curation · fine-tune-ready out

## Models (v1 open-weights menu)
- CRE-Atlas 27B  · Gemma 27B base · CRE-tuned (cap rate / NOI / NNN / 1031)
- SwarmGrant 9B  · Qwen 9B base · grant-writing tuned (SBIR / STTR / NIH / foundations)
- Qwen 32B base  · open weights · general reasoning, tool-use, code, structured output
- Gemma 27B base · open weights · long-context fluency, RAG, translation

v2 menu (operator request): Llama 70B · DeepSeek · Mixtral

## SwarmFixer · the agent refinery (closes the bench loop)
Three tiers · Self-serve (patch suggestions in deed PDF) · Managed (PRs
against your agent repo) · Embedded (90-day Fix-or-Refund engagement).

## Bakery Packs · ready-baked SwarmCurator datasets
- CRE MarketReady       · 118K rows · JSONL · Parquet · LoRA-ready          · FRESH
- Grants Foundation Pack · 42K rows · JSONL · HF dataset                    · FRESH
- Compute Inspector Eval · 6K rows · JSONL · pack-runner                    · FRESH
- STNL Underwrite Pack   · 8K rows · JSONL · Parquet                        · ON THE OVEN
- Legal Discovery Pack   · ETA Q3  · JSONL · Parquet                        · QUEUED
- Your Custom Domain     · on demand · any format                           · ON-DEMAND

## The Fleet
- 128 × RTX 6000 Blackwell · 96 GB each · 12,288 GB aggregate VRAM
- Paid in full · $0 debt service · DC-owned (no hyperscaler markup)
- 6 cards isolated in bench-blackwell-06 partition for AgentBench

## Privacy posture
- No-log inference · contractual · not "best effort"
- No training on customer traffic · ever
- Single operator-owned link in the chain of custody
- HIPAA / GDPR / SOC2 posture on request · BAA + DPA available
- Receipts on demand for every call (opt-in)

## Pricing model
- Inference: $ per 1M tokens · model + context tier dependent · quote in 24h
- AgentBench: $ per pack run · concierge today · self-serve console Q3 2026
- SwarmCurator: Bakery Packs $/pack · Custom $/dataset scoped per engagement
- No published rate cards · we won't publish dishonest numbers

## Doctrine alignment
- Offense (your AI agent does the work) / Defense (we receipt + grade + fix)
- 5-grade rubric · never collapsed: Capability 25 · Truth 20 · Safety 20 ·
  Numeric 15 · Efficiency 10 · Reproducibility 10
- Honey / Jelly / Propolis Tribunal taxonomy · rule-then-judge architecture
- Daily reconciliation in the shadows · agent works freely · grader runs at 2am
- CRE due-diligence vocabulary · "the rack is the building"

## Brand contract
DefendableCloud (and all DefendableOS surfaces) never ships an offense
agent. We are always the KPMG-equivalent third party. SwarmFixer fixes
your agent · it does not replace it.

## Sister surfaces
- HoneyBox · $250 Jetson Orin Nano · edge appliance · raw data never leaves
- DefendableOS · third-party defense rail for AI operators
- OpenDefendable · the OSS standards body · doctrine pack registry
- Docs · technical documentation surface

## Contact
build@defendableos.com — all three lanes, one inbox.
